candidates.text:
Subject: You need to listen to this album - Lilith

Hi Luheng,

I hope you're doing well! I was just listening to the album *Lilith* and it immediately made me think of you. It’s such a unique and captivating record—the blend of haunting melodies and powerful storytelling really resonated with me.

I know you have such great taste in music, so I thought you’d appreciate the depth and atmosphere of this one. It’s not your typical listen; it’s more of an experience. If you haven’t checked it out yet, I highly recommend giving it a listen. Let me know what you think once you’ve had a chance to hear it—I’d love to hear your take on it.

Best,  
[Your Name]

P.S. I’ll send you a link to the album so you can dive in whenever you’re ready.

Subject: You Need to Hear This Album – Lilith!

Hi Luheng,

I hope you’re doing well! I’ve been listening to the album *Lilith* on repeat lately, and I honestly can’t stop thinking about how perfect it would be for you. The way it blends haunting melodies with powerful storytelling feels like it matches your taste perfectly.

From the opening track, there’s this incredible tension that builds throughout the album—like a dark fairy tale coming to life. The vocals are raw and emotional, and the production is so rich and layered. It’s the kind of record that makes you want to stare out the window and lose yourself in it for hours.

I’d love to listen to it together sometime—maybe over coffee or just a quiet evening. Let me know what you think, and if you’re up for it, I’ll send you a link or copy.

Talk soon,  
[Your Name]

P.S. If you end up liking it, we *have* to talk about the track “Ashes of the Moon” — it’s the one that made me cry the first time I heard it.

Subject: You need to listen to this album — Lilith

Hi Luheng,

I’ve been listening to an album called *Lilith* lately, and I’m absolutely in love with it. It’s got this haunting, cinematic vibe with some incredible production and storytelling. The way the melodies build and the lyrics unfold really moved me.

I immediately thought of you because I know how much you appreciate music that goes beyond the usual. I’d love for you to give it a listen and let me know what you think. If you’re open to it, I can share a link or even drop by with a copy sometime.

Let me know if you’d like to hear it — I think you’ll really connect with it.

Best,  
[Your Name]

P.S. I’ve been humming the third track all day — it’s stuck in my head like nothing else has in years.

Subject: You need to hear this album—Lilith

Hi Luheng,

I was just listening to the album *Lilith* again, and I immediately thought of you. It’s honestly one of my favorite records, and I can’t wait for you to give it a listen.

There’s something so captivating about the way the music blends haunting melodies with such raw emotion. It feels both timeless and incredibly fresh at the same time. I think you’d really connect with the atmosphere and the lyrical depth—it reminds me a lot of the kind of music you’ve mentioned enjoying in the past.

I’d love to hear what you think once you’ve had a chance to listen. Maybe we could even listen to it together sometime soon?

Let me know!

Best,  
[Your Name]

P.S. Start with track 3—it’s the one that made me fall in love with the album.
